ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Intensity, Morphologic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., experimental, simulated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature this parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Axis, Dimension) */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., string, int) */,
  "param_range" TEXT /* Allowed range of values for the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "constraint" INTEGER /* Whether the parameter value is constrained or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the configuration */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature being configured */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter being configured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the parameter in the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration used for this visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Raw data for the visualization (e.g., image, csv) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role in JSON format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_parameters" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the default parameter setting */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature this parameter belongs to */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the default parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the default parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_parameters_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_parameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being commented on */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_types" (
  "vis_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization type (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the collaboration */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
